name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-iap

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-iap
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Iap SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Iap SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-iap
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common iap
```

---
param _AuthorizationEndpoint: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Endpoint\uFF0COpenID Connect\u8EAB\

  \u4F9B\u7684Openid-configuration\u4E2D\"authorization_endpoint\"\u5B57\u6BB5\u7684\
  \u503C\u3002"
param _ClientId: "\u5BA2\u6237\u7AEFID\uFF0C\u5728OpenID Connect\u8EAB\u4EFD\u63D0\
  \u4F9B\u5546\u6CE8\u518C\u7684\u5BA2\u6237\u7AEFID\u3002"
param _Description: "\u63CF\u8FF0"
param _IdentityKey: "\u7B7E\u540D\u516C\u94A5\uFF0C\u9700\u8981base64_encode\u3002\
  \u9A8C\u8BC1OpenID Connect\u8EAB\u4EFD\u63D0\u4F9B\u5546ID Token\u7B7E\u540D\u7684\
  \u516C\u94A5\u3002\u4E3A\u4E86\u60A8\u7684\u8D26\u53F7\u5B89\u5168\uFF0C\u5EFA\u8BAE\
  \u60A8\u5B9A\u671F\u8F6E\u6362\u7B7E\u540D\u516C\u94A5\u3002"
param _IdentityUrl: "\u8EAB\u4EFD\u63D0\u4F9B\u5546URL\u3002OpenID Connect\u8EAB\u4EFD\
  \u63D0\u4F9B\u5546\u6807\u8BC6\u3002\u5BF9\u5E94\u4F01\u4E1AIdP\u63D0\u4F9B\u7684\
  Openid-configuration\u4E2D\"issuer\"\u5B57\u6BB5\u7684\u503C\u3002"
param _MappingFiled: "\u6620\u5C04\u5B57\u6BB5\u540D\u79F0\u3002IdP\u7684id_token\u4E2D\
  \u54EA\u4E00\u4E2A\u5B57\u6BB5\u6620\u5C04\u5230\u5B50\u7528\u6237\u7684\u7528\u6237\
  \u540D\uFF0C\u901A\u5E38\u662Fsub\u6216\u8005name\u5B57\u6BB5"
param _ResponseMode: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Response mode\u3002\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\
  \u6C42\u8FD4\u56DE\u6A21\u5F0F\uFF0Cform_post\u548Cfragment\u4E24\u79CD\u53EF\u9009\
  \u6A21\u5F0F\uFF0C\u63A8\u8350\u9009\u62E9form_post\u6A21\u5F0F\u3002"
param _ResponseType: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Response type\uFF0C\u56FA\u5B9A\u503C\
  id_token"
param _Scope: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Scope\u3002openid; email;profile\u3002\u6388\
  \u6743\u8BF7\u6C42\u4FE1\u606F\u8303\u56F4\u3002\u9ED8\u8BA4\u5FC5\u9009openid\u3002"
type AuthorizationEndpoint: str
type ClientId: str
type Description: str
type IdentityKey: str
type IdentityUrl: str
type MappingFiled: str
type ResponseMode: str
type ResponseType: str
type Scope: list of str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.IdentityUrl
documentation:
身份提供商URL。OpenID Connect身份提供商标识。对应企业IdP提供的Openid-configuration中"issuer"字段的值。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ClientId
documentation:
客户端ID，在OpenID Connect身份提供商注册的客户端ID。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.AuthorizationEndpoint
documentation:
授权请求Endpoint，OpenID Connect身份提供商授权地址。对应企业IdP提供的Openid-configuration中"authorization_endpoint"字段的值。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ResponseType
documentation:
授权请求Response type，固定值id_token
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ResponseMode
documentation:
授权请求Response mode。授权请求返回模式，form_post和fragment两种可选模式，推荐选择form_post模式。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.MappingFiled
documentation:
映射字段名称。IdP的id_token中哪一个字段映射到子用户的用户名，通常是sub或者name字段
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.IdentityKey
documentation:
签名公钥，需要base64_encode。验证OpenID Connect身份提供商ID Token签名的公钥。为了您的账号安全，建议您定期轮换签名公钥。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.Scope
documentation:
授权请求Scope。openid; email;profile。授权请求信息范围。默认必选openid。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.CreateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.Description
documentation:
描述
\:rtype: str
CreateIAPUserOIDCConfig请求参数结构体

  \u8D26\u53F7\u5B89\u5168\uFF0C\u5EFA\u8BAE\u60A8\u5B9A\u671F\u8F6E\u6362\u7B7E\u540D\
  \u516C\u94A5\u3002"
param _IdentityUrl: "\u8EAB\u4EFD\u63D0\u4F9B\u5546URL\u3002OpenID Connect\u8EAB\u4EFD\
  \u63D0\u4F9B\u5546\u6807\u8BC6\u3002\u5BF9\u5E94\u4F01\u4E1AIdP\u63D0\u4F9B\u7684\
  Openid-configuration\u4E2D\"issuer\"\u5B57\u6BB5\u7684\u503C\u3002"
param _MappingFiled: "\u6620\u5C04\u5B57\u6BB5\u540D\u79F0\u3002IdP\u7684id_token\u4E2D\
  \u54EA\u4E00\u4E2A\u5B57\u6BB5\u6620\u5C04\u5230\u5B50\u7528\u6237\u7684\u7528\u6237\
  \u540D\uFF0C\u901A\u5E38\u662Fsub\u6216\u8005name\u5B57\u6BB5"
param _ResponseMode: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Response mode\u3002\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\
  \u6C42\u8FD4\u56DE\u6A21\u5F0F\uFF0Cform_post\u548Cfragment\u4E24\u79CD\u53EF\u9009\
  \u6A21\u5F0F\uFF0C\u63A8\u8350\u9009\u62E9form_post\u6A21\u5F0F\u3002"
param _ResponseType: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Response type\uFF0C\u56FA\u5B9A\u503C\
  id_token"
param _Scope: "\u6388\u6743\u8BF7\u6C42Scope\u3002openid; email;profile\u3002\u6388\
  \u6743\u8BF7\u6C42\u4FE1\u606F\u8303\u56F4\u3002\u9ED8\u8BA4\u5FC5\u9009openid\u3002"
type AuthorizationEndpoint: str
type ClientId: str
type Description: str
type IdentityKey: str
type IdentityUrl: str
type MappingFiled: str
type ResponseMode: str
type ResponseType: str
type Scope: list of str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.IdentityUrl
documentation:
身份提供商URL。OpenID Connect身份提供商标识。对应企业IdP提供的Openid-configuration中"issuer"字段的值。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ClientId
documentation:
客户端ID，在OpenID Connect身份提供商注册的客户端ID。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.AuthorizationEndpoint
documentation:
授权请求Endpoint，OpenID Connect身份提供商授权地址。对应企业IdP提供的Openid-configuration中"authorization_endpoint"字段的值。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ResponseType
documentation:
授权请求Response type，固定值id_token
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.ResponseMode
documentation:
授权请求Response mode。授权请求返回模式，form_post和fragment两种可选模式，推荐选择form_post模式。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.MappingFiled
documentation:
映射字段名称。IdP的id_token中哪一个字段映射到子用户的用户名，通常是sub或者name字段
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.IdentityKey
documentation:
RSA签名公钥，JWKS格式，需要进行base64_encode。验证OpenID Connect身份提供商ID Token签名的公钥。为了您的账号安全，建议您定期轮换签名公钥。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.Scope
documentation:
授权请求Scope。openid; email;profile。授权请求信息范围。默认必选openid。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigRequest.Description
documentation:
描述，长度为1~255个英文或中文字符，默认值为空。
\:rtype: str
UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfig请求参数结构体

classes.name: tencentcloud.iap.v20240713.models.UpdateIAPUserOIDCConfigResponse
